devnotes.summary: Module for carbon and nitrogen partitioning at the organ level (root, stem, leaves, grains) in wheat.
devnotes.remarks: Implements C translocation to grains based on experimental results (see Appendix, Ratjen Diss. 2012). N concentrations in organs during vegetative growth are adapted from TSubPartitioningVegNew (U. Böttcher, Meyer-Schatz), with modifications for drought stress according to 2010 experimental results (see Ratjen Diss. Appendix). Leaf N distribution is calculated for specific leaf layers at anthesis, based on 2010 experimental results (see Ratjen Diss. Appendix). N dynamics are modeled similarly to Bertheloot 2008 (see Ratjen Diss. Appendix). Implements sigmoid grain filling (October 2015). Partitioning of N deficit follows Ratjen & Kage 2016 (JACS). Main authors: A.M. Ratjen, U. Böttcher, H. Kage et al. Restructured and commented by H. Kage, 2024.

devnotes.summary: Type of grain filling algorithm, cwt3: according to ceres wheat 3, pothi: potential harvest index
option for drought impact, with or whithout drough stress
two options for partitioning of shoot/root according to Ceres Wheat or Kage 2000

summary.summary: Represents the partitioning of resources in a wheat plant.

devnotes.summary: change rate of N-storage pool leaf
change rate of N-storage pool stem
structural leaf N per square meter
Calculates the change in seed reserve for the Hume Wheat Partitioning component.
Calculates the QHI (Harvest Index) for the wheat partitioning.
Calculates the potential harvest index (HI) for wheat.

THumeNumEntity is an abstract base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values. It extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

THumeNumEntity is an abstract base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values. It extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

THumeNumEntity is an abstract base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values. It extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.
parameter for leaf stem DM partitioning under N limitation Ratjen & Kage 2015 (2016?)
parameter for leaf stem DM partitioning under N limitation Ratjen & Kage 2015 (2016?)

fit parameter for calculation of GPSM

extinction coefficient for photosynthetically active radiation

summary.param: The TMod object representing the global module.

devnotes.summary: Calculates the Normalized Nitrogen Index (NNI) for wheat partitioning.

summary.summary: Calculates the value of Q45, i.e. the radiation/thermal quotient 45 days.

devnotes.summary: Calculates the grain per square meter (GPSM).

summary.summary: Calculates the GRFILL (Grain Fill) for the THumeWheatPartitioning class.
